markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 28, 2026 9 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 83.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 83.99° on Jun 28, 2026 at 9am EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. records 1+ stolen bases in Texas vs Toronto professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026 at 1:37 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on stolen bases recorded.
markets.title: Vladimir Guerrero Jr.: 1+ stolen bases?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Sabrina Ionescu records 3+ three pointers in the New York at Golden State women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the New York at Golden State women's professional basketball game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026. If a player is active but never takes the court, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game the market settles based on the player's threes recorded.
markets.title: Sabrina Ionescu: 3+ threes

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Yibing Wu records at least 6 total match aces in the full match of the Yibing Wu vs Novak Djokovic professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Round Of 128, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Ace: A serve that lands in the service box and is not touched by the receiving player (including their racket, body, or clothing), resulting in an immediate point for the server.

If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If a retirement occurs, all markets will resolve based on the statistics officially completed and recorded prior to the cancellation or discontinuation of the match.
markets.title: Will Yibing Wu record at least 6 total match aces in the Yibing Wu vs Novak Djokovic match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Novak Djokovic records at least 14 total match aces in the full match of the Yibing Wu vs Novak Djokovic professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Round Of 128, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Ace: A serve that lands in the service box and is not touched by the receiving player (including their racket, body, or clothing), resulting in an immediate point for the server.

If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If a retirement occurs, all markets will resolve based on the statistics officially completed and recorded prior to the cancellation or discontinuation of the match.
markets.title: Will Novak Djokovic record at least 14 total match aces in the Yibing Wu vs Novak Djokovic match?
